core_payload.content:
# User Preferences

## 1. Role
User Preferences will become a richer behavioral contract for the second brain, allowing planning, notifications, autonomy, and assistant behavior to adapt to the person with far more nuance than baseline settings allow.

## 2. Future Preference Contract
This layer will govern when the platform should speak, stay quiet, wake the human, or let the swarm continue safely. It will shape sleep posture, quiet windows, assistant style, autonomy tolerance, review thresholds, and intervention behavior as explicit operating law.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Human rhythm will remain central even as the system becomes more capable. Planning, night autonomy, reminder pressure, and control-surface behavior will align to one durable person-specific contract instead of generic automation defaults.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
User Preferences supports To Dig Deep by teaching deep systems how to serve human rhythm rather than forcing humans to adapt to machine convenience.

neuro_concentrate.summary: User Preferences defines the future richer behavioral contract for N1Hub: deeper handling of sleep and quiet posture, assistant style, autonomy tolerance, review thresholds, and intervention timing so the platform behaves like a tuned partner instead of a generic automation stack.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
